props.name: focal
props.description: Sets the focal point of the galaxy effect as \[x, y\] coordinates from 0 to 1

props.name: rotation
props.description: Controls the rotation matrix of the galaxy as \[x, y\] rotation values

props.name: starSpeed
props.description: Controls the speed of star movement and animation

props.name: density
props.description: Controls the density of stars in the galaxy

props.name: hueShift
props.description: Shifts the hue of all stars by the specified degrees (0-360)

props.name: disableAnimation
props.description: When true, stops all time-based animations

props.name: speed
props.description: Global speed multiplier for all animations

props.name: mouseInteraction
props.description: Enables or disables mouse interaction with the galaxy

props.name: glowIntensity
props.description: Controls the intensity of the star glow effect

props.name: saturation
props.description: Controls color saturation of stars (0 = grayscale, 1 = full color)

props.name: mouseRepulsion
props.description: When true, stars are repelled by the mouse cursor

props.name: twinkleIntensity
props.description: Controls how much stars twinkle (0 = no twinkle, 1 = maximum twinkle)

props.name: repulsionStrength
props.description: Strength of mouse repulsion effect when mouseRepulsion is enabled

props.name: autoCenterRepulsion
props.description: Creates repulsion from center of canvas. Overrides mouse repulsion when > 0

props.name: transparent
props.description: Makes the black background transparent, showing only stars
